case_title: ADVANCED SHUTTLE SERVICE VS SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY ADVANCED SHUTTLE SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED SHUTTLE SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE CO. $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,412.79, DEFT'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE DENIED. DEFT AGREED TO HAVE THE CASE HEARD 4/10/92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE CO.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21799, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED SHUTTLE SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE CO. INSURANCE POLICY EXCLUDES COVERAGE FOR THIS LOSS. JUDG.ENTERED ON 07/23/92 IN SUPERIOR COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
